entities: Sonic Industries Services LLC and Subsidiaries

note_1_description.policy: Single-member LLC formed 3/23/2011. Sole owner: Sonic Capital LLC. Franchises QSR chain in US. Revenue from royalties post-5/20/2011 FAs.

note_2_accounting_policies.fiscal_year: 52 or 53 weeks ending Sunday closest to Dec 31
note_2_accounting_policies.restricted_cash: Cash held to meet securitization reserve requirements
note_2_accounting_policies.accounts_receivable: Due within 30 days; allowance based on lifetime expected loss
note_2_accounting_policies.intangible_assets: Franchise agreements amortized straight-line; reviewed for impairment — none indicated 2022-2024
note_2_accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Royalties recognized when earned. Initial franchise fees deferred and recognized straight-line over FA term.
note_2_accounting_policies.income_taxes: Single-member LLC not subject to federal/state income taxes — pass-through to Parent

note_5_commitments.guarantor_status: Sonic Franchising LLC guarantees Sonic Co-Issuer obligations and pledged substantially all assets
note_5_commitments.legal_matters: Various litigation incidental to business; no material adverse effect expected

note_6_related_party.license_fees: Based primarily on royalty fees collected, included in Royalty fees to Affiliates on income statement. Results may not be indicative of stand-alone operations.

note_1_description.policy: Direct wholly-owned sub of Sonic LLC. Indirect sub of Inspire Brands. Converted from corp to LLC on 12/31/2022. Provides franchising services; leases real estate.

note_2_accounting_policies.fiscal_year: 52 or 53 weeks ending Sunday closest to Dec 31
note_2_accounting_policies.accounts_receivable: Due within 30 days; allowance for credit losses based on lifetime expected loss
note_2_accounting_policies.property_equipment: Cost less accumulated depreciation. Useful lives: office/restaurant equip 3-15 yrs, transportation 3-5 yrs, buildings 7-40 yrs, site improvements 7-25 yrs
note_2_accounting_policies.goodwill: Annual impairment test (Q4); income approach (DCF) + market approach (Level 3). No impairment 2022-2024. $822.6M.
note_2_accounting_policies.indefinite_lived_intangibles: Trademark $1.1B. Relief-from-royalty method for fair value. No impairment 2022-2024.
note_2_accounting_policies.definite_lived_intangibles: Franchise agreements 17 years straight-line ($250M gross, $160.8M net). Computer software 1-7 years ($12.5M gross, $3.3M net). Developed technology fully amortized.
note_2_accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Royalties when earned. Franchise fees deferred over FA term. Rental income straight-line.
note_2_accounting_policies.income_taxes: Included in Inspire consolidated returns through 2022 conversion. Post-conversion: LLC not subject to federal/state income taxes. 2024 effective rate: -0.1%.
note_2_accounting_policies.debt_issuance_costs: Direct deduction from debt, amortized as interest using effective interest method
note_2_accounting_policies.leases_lessor: Operating leases; fixed monthly or tiered % (5-8%) of gross sales. Leases expire over next 8 years.
note_2_accounting_policies.fair_value: Cash, receivables, payables approximate book value. Goodwill and indefinite-lived tested Level 3.

note_8_income_taxes.llc_conversion_impact: All subsidiaries became LLCs by 12/31/2023; no longer subject to federal/state income taxes

sis_notes.note_9_related_party: Included in SIS note 2 and income statement line items. Affiliate revenues: royalties $18.6M, rental $10.8M, other $23.0M (FY2024).
sis_notes.note_10_commitments: Same securitization structure as SFLLC Note 5. Legal matters: no material adverse effect expected.
